parameters.content:
Build a workflow that:
1. Uses a Manual trigger with sample customer feedback
texts. Customer feedback can come from anywhere -
Google Sheets, Edit Node, Code Node, etc.
2. Applies Sentient Analysis to categorize feedback as
positive, negative or neutral.
3. Enrich the feedback with timestamp and sentiment scores
4. Filter the negative feedback
5. Output the negative feedback data only
Bonus:
6. Send email with the list of negative feedback comments
and data
7. Add strength and confidence thresholds to identify the
urgent cases (very angry and unhappy customers)

parameters.text: Prepare email including all feedbacks. Summarize all feedbacks into a single email. Make it look good and easy to read also higlight the very angry and unhappy customers
